behaviorDifference: No production request behavior changed. Phase 0 adds only a reproducible offline dataset, validation command, tests, reports, and the progress ledger.
knownLimitations: The local query-event store contained 60 events but only one unique privacy-clean runtime question; repeated events were not counted as distinct samples.
The remaining startup cases come from repository regressions and deterministic real-style derivations; they are not claimed as 300 independent production conversations.
The system Node runtime does not provide node:sqlite, so 20 existing SQLite/provider/obsolete tests remain skipped and are not counted as passed.
rollback: Remove the phase 0 dataset, runner, tests, reports and package scripts; no production module or data migration is involved.
